SEC_CONTACT_EMAIL.description: Real email for the User-Agent header. SEC mandates a contact in the User-Agent on every request to *.sec.gov; missing or invalid → 403. Use a monitored mailbox.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Enables two LLM-backed fallbacks: (1) status resolver — fires when validator emits title_mismatch on extracted items, asks Claude Haiku 4.5 to confirm/correct status (catches era-renames like pre-2003 Item 14, unusual IBR phrasings); (2) locator fallback — fires when required items are missing, asks the LLM to find them in the first 50KB of the doc. Capped at 1 call/request, ≤50KB input. Without this key the pipeline runs rules-only and leaves the warnings unresolved.
